title: Career Opportunity Real Estate Agent at Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Real Estate Agent at Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services:
Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services!
